description: ChatGPT is represented as a commercial OpenAI product backed by OpenAI's closed model family.

sources.title: How ChatGPT and our foundation models are developed
sources.quote: OpenAI’s foundation models, including the models that power ChatGPT, are developed using three primary sources of information: (1) information that is publicly available on the internet, (2) information that we partner with third parties to access, and (3) information that our users, human trainers, and researchers provide or generate.
